market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience modern comfort in this 4-guest aparthotel with private balcony/garden access and secure parking included. Rated 4.77 by 77 guests, this property offers stylish amenities and central location benefits. The £157 rate provides exceptional value compared to our city's £175 median price. Sleeps up to 4 guests in well-equipped spaces—ideal for families or small groups seeking both outdoor relaxation and urban convenience. With 76 open nights available over 90 days (15.2% current occupancy), this property offers an opportunity for hosts to leverage its lower pricing strategy and 4.77-star reputation to attract more stays. Key features include [insert verified amenities based on actual property capabilities] to enhance guest comfort. Previously hosted 77 stays with average positive ratings.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize balcony/garden view as cover photo to capitalize on highest-value 'Outdoor' category appeal
key_diagnosis: Rate is £18 below median at £157 vs £175 yet occupancy (15.2%) lags 28.3% market median - suggesting price may not be competitive differentiator
